coll-book_creator_intro: <big>Adigoo adeegsanaya ''abuuraha buugga'', waxaad samayn kartaa buug ka kooban bogagga wiki-ga ee aad doorato. Waxaad u dhoofin kartaa buugga qaabab kala duwan (tusaale ahaan PDF ama ODF) ama waxaad dalban kartaa nuqul daabacan.</big>
coll-book_creator_help: Macluumaad dheeraad ah ka eeg [[{{MediaWiki:Coll-helppage}}|bogga caawinta ee ku saabsan buugaagta]].
coll-book_creator_disable_text: ''Abuuraha buugga'' waa la naafeeyn doonaa, buugga aad ku shaqaynaysayna waa laga saari doonaa.
coll-download_text: Si aad u soo dejiso buuggaaga, dooro qaab oo guji badhanka.
coll-download_as_text: Si aad buuggaaga ugu soo dejiso qaabka $1, guji badhanka.
coll-drag_and_drop: Isticmaal badhamada fallaarta si aad dib ugu habayso bogagga wiki-ga iyo cutubyada
coll-request_failed_msg: Waxaa dhacay qalad intii la isku dayayay in buuggaaga la sameeyo.
coll-save_category: Dhammaan buugaagta la kaydiyay waxaa lagu daraa qaybta [[:Category:{{MediaWiki:Coll-bookscategory}}|{{MediaWiki:Coll-bookscategory}}]].
coll-overwrite_title:
Boggu wuu jiraa.
Ma rabtaa inaad ku dul qorto?
coll-overwrite_text:
Bog leh magaca [[:$1]] hore ayuu u jiraa.
Ma rabtaa in lagu beddelo buuggaaga?
coll-load_overwrite_text:
Waxaad horey ugu haysataa bogag qaar buuggaaga ku jira.
Ma rabtaa inaad ku dul qorto buuggaaga hadda jira, aad ku darto nuxurka cusub, mise aad joojiso soo dejinta buuggan?
coll-limit_exceeded_title: Buuggu aad buu u weyn yahay
coll-limit_exceeded_text:
Buuggaaga aad buu u weyn yahay.
Bogag dheeraad ah laguma dari karo.
coll-rendering_text:
Fadlan sug inta dukumeentiga la samaynayo.

Horumarka: $1% $2

Boggani waa inuu si toos ah isu cusboonaysiiyaa dhowr ilbiriqsi kasta. Haddii tani shaqayn weydo, fadlan riix badhanka cusboonaysiinta ee biraawsarkaaga.
coll-rendering_finished_text: Faylka dukumeentiga waa la sameeyay. [$1 Soo dejiso faylka] kombiyuutarkaaga.
coll-rendering_finished_note_not_satisfi: Kuma qanacsanayn natiijada? Ka eeg [[{{MediaWiki:Coll-helppage}}|bogga caawinta ee ku saabsan buugaagta]] si aad u ogaato fursadaha lagu hagaajin karo.
coll-rendering_finished_note_article_rdf: Hadda dukumeentiyada qaar kuma jiraan jadwallo. Beddel ahaan waxaad isticmaali kartaa $1, ka dooro "Daabac" liiska biraawsarka, kadibna isticmaal ikhtiyaarka "Ku keydi sida PDF".
coll-download_notfound_text:
Faylka aad isku dayayso inaad soo dejiso ma jiro:
Waxaa laga yaabaa in la tirtiray oo loo baahan yahay in dib loo sameeyo.
coll-is_cached: • Nuqul kaydsan oo dukumeentiga ah ayaa la helay, sidaas darteed samayn looma baahnayn. [$1 Dib u samee khasab]
coll-book_text: Ka hel buug daabacan lammaanahayaga daabacaadda marka la dalbado.
coll-invalid_podpartner_title: Lammaanaha POD waa mid aan sax ahayn
coll-invalid_podpartner_msg:
Lammaanaha POD ee la bixiyay ma aha mid sax ah.
Fadlan la xiriir maamulahaaga MediaWiki.
coll-suggest_title: Bogag lagu taliyay oo loogu talagalay buuggaaga
coll-suggest_intro_text:
Talooyin ku saabsan bogagga loogu darayo buuggaaga

Talooyinku waxay ku salaysan yihiin bogagga wiki-ga ee hadda ku jira buuggaaga.
Liiska waa la cusboonaysiiyaa mar kasta oo aad gujiso badhamada ku darista ama ka saarista.
coll-load_local_book: Guji "Hagaag" si aad u sii wadato buuggaaga $1 oo ka kooban $2 {{PLURAL:$2|bog wiki ah|bogag wiki ah}}. Guji "Jooji" si aad u tirtirto oo aad uga bilowdo buug madhan.
action-collectionsaveasuserpage: ku kaydi buugaagta sida bogga isticmaalaha
right-collectionsaveasuserpage: Ku kaydi buugaagta sida bogga isticmaalaha
action-collectionsaveascommunitypage: ku kaydi buugaagta sida bogga bulshada
right-collectionsaveascommunitypage: Ku kaydi buugaagta sida bogga bulshada
coll-download_as_tooltip: Soo dejiso nooca $1 ee boggan wiki-ga
coll-add_linked_article: Ku dar bogga wiki-ga ee ku xiran buuggaaga
coll-remove_linked_article: Ka saar bogga wiki-ga ee ku xiran buuggaaga
coll-add_category_tooltip: Ku dar dhammaan bogagga wiki-ga ee qaybtan ku jira buuggaaga
coll-add_page_tooltip: Ku dar bogga wiki-ga hadda jira buuggaaga
coll-clear_collection_confirm: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad gebi ahaanba nadiifiso buuggaaga?
coll-clear_collection_tooltip: Ka saar dhammaan bogagga wiki-ga ee ku jira buuggaaga hadda jira
coll-help_tooltip: Muuji caawinta ku saabsan abuurista buugaagta
coll-load_collection_tooltip: Soo geli buuggan sida buuggaaga hadda jira
coll-remove_page_tooltip: Ka saar bogga wiki-ga hadda jira buuggaaga
coll-show_collection_tooltip: Guji si aad wax uga beddesho/soo dejiso/dalbato buuggaaga
coll-make_suggestions_tooltip: Muuji talooyin ku salaysan bogagga ku jira buuggaaga
coll-attribution-page:
Qoraalka iyo ilaha sawirrada, wax ku biiriyayaasha, iyo shatiyada

Qoraal

$1

Sawirro

$2

Shatiga nuxurka

$3
coll-notice-download-pdf-text: Abuuraha Buuggu ma taageero samaynta PDF ([[mw:Reading/Web/PDF_Functionality|wax badan ka baro]]), laakiin waxaad isku dayi kartaa '''''Soo dejiso sida PDF''''' oo ku jira qalabka dhinaca ee maqaalada gaarka ah.
coll-rendererror-no-session: Qeexidda buugga lagama helin fadhiga. Waxaa laga yaabaa in la tirtiray sababo la xiriira hawl la'aan.
coll-rendererror-fetch-wrapper:
Waxaa dhacay khaladaad intii la isku dayayay in la helo nuxurka bogagga:
$1
coll-rendererror-no-cache: Xogta buugga lagama helin kaydka. Tani waxay u badan tahay inay tahay qalad ku jira barnaamijka.
